reference: I am six months pregnant, and my husband is experiencing symptoms that seem to be prostatitis. He is also having some mild sweating at night. I have been diagnosed with a urinary tract infection by my obstetrician-gynecologist, and I am on antibiotics. Is sex putting the baby at risk? He cannot ejaculate right now. He says it itches really badly when he tries.
text: Are you picking a fight? What is the purpose of fighting with your partner?
